===== start exec cmd: [display device manufacture-info] =====
<LAB-AS-STACK>
<LAB-AS-STACK>display device manufacture-info
Slot  Sub  Serial-number          Manu-date
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
0     -    1020LAB000011           2020-12-05
1     -    1020LAB000012           2020-12-11
===== end exec cmd =====
